claims.claim: Hebrew NLP models used: the DictaBERT family (dicta-il/dictabert base masked-LM, -ner, -sentiment, -morph, -heq, -large-char-menaked Nakdan, neodictabert-bilingual-embed), the DictaLM 3.0 family (24B-Base/Thinking, Nemotron-12B-Instruct/Base, 1.7B-Thinking), and ivrit.ai Whisper (whisper-large-v3, -turbo-ct2). dictabert is a masked-LM base with no classification head, fine-tune or use a task-specific model for classification
claims.raw_snippet: dicta-il/dictabert dictabert-ner dictabert-sentiment dictabert-morph dictabert-heq dictabert-large-char-menaked neodictabert-bilingual-embed DictaLM-3.0; AutoModelForMaskedLM; ivrit-ai/whisper-large-v3 turbo-ct2

claims.claim: ivrit.ai Whisper v3 is fine-tuned on the ivrit.ai Hebrew speech corpus, a 22K+ hour dataset (the 22K figure is the dataset size, not the checkpoint training-set size)
claims.raw_snippet: ivrit.ai Hebrew speech corpus, 22K+ hour dataset; whisper-large-v3 fine-tuned on the ivrit.ai corpus

claims.claim: Hebrew preprocessing: niqqud Unicode range U+0591-U+05C7, sofit normalization, NFC; a minor threshold/percentage used in the preprocessing script
Reference URLs cited by the skill
claims.raw_snippet: URLs: https://dicta.org.il/developers https://dicta.org.il/publications/DictaLM_3_0___Techincal_Report.pdf https://github.com/8400TheHealthNetwork/HebSpacy https://github.com/NNLP-IL https://huggingface.co/dicta-il https://huggingface.co/ivrit-ai https://huggingface.co/onlplab/alephbert-base https://nakdan.dicta.org.il/ https://stanfordnlp.github.io/stanza/ https://www.ivrit.ai/en/
